core_payload.content:
# Capsule Markup Agent

## 1. Role
Capsule Markup Agent keeps the vault highly legible to humans and agents as scale increases. Structural validity is not enough; metadata, summaries, keywords, naming, and taxonomy also need continuous maintenance as explicit semantic surfaces.

## 2. Annotation Surface
- clearer automatic enrichment of metadata, summaries, and keyword layers
- tighter taxonomy consistency across types, subtypes, tiers, and naming conventions
- stronger support for Librarian, retrieval, and graph-grounded assistant answers
- safer repair of semantically weak capsules without inventing new truth claims

## 3. Operational Consequence
The vault remains readable, retrievable, and cognitively efficient because semantic clarity is treated as a first-class maintenance lane rather than as optional polish.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Capsule Markup Agent supports To Dig Deep by making depth legible.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Markup Agent defines the semantic-maintenance lane that keeps the vault legible to both humans and agents as scale increases. It covers metadata enrichment, summary and keyword quality, taxonomy discipline, and bounded repair of semantically weak capsules without inventing new truth claims. The capsule matters because structural validity is not enough when retrieval, grounding, and cross-capsule interpretation depend on clear annotation layers. It turns semantic clarity into an explicit maintenance function instead of optional polish applied only after the vault becomes harder to read.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language and stale keyword residue so the capsule states present semantic-maintenance doctrine directly.
